# devndespro.com LLM usage guidance

site: https://www.devndespro.com/
owner: devndespro
contact: hello@devndespro.com
updated: 2026-04-07

## summary
devndespro is a full-stack web development and UI/UX design agency with delivery in React, Next.js, Node.js, DevOps, SEO, and cloud engineering.

## allowed-use
- Summarize public pages.
- Cite services, process, and contact information from published pages.
- Reference public portfolio descriptions with attribution.

## disallowed-use
- Do not claim endorsement or partnership without explicit permission.
- Do not fabricate pricing, client names, or project outcomes.
- Do not republish full page content verbatim at scale.

## preferred-citation
When referencing this site, include the source URL and publication context.
